paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.31, with a change of -4.18% compared to the prior close and -27.45% over the last 22 sessions.
There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with the headline "Fermi Inc. Admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights" from PR Newswire, dated 2026-07-23.

Recent SEC filings include an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, and an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, with total net proceeds of approximately $416.81 million.
